violations.description: Each E2E test performs full UI login flow, increasing runtime and noise for functional assertions.
violations.suggestion: Use storageState/session fixture to reuse authenticated context.

violations.description: Lifecycle matrix test performs three navigations in one test body.
violations.suggestion: Split into parameterized cases or keep as-is if preserving matrix intent is preferred.
violations.code_snippet: await page.goto(...unclaimed); ... await page.goto(...claimed); ... await page.goto(...closed);

slow_tests: E2E cases with full login setup

recommendations: Adopt storageState fixture for E2E auth reuse
Optionally split multi-navigation matrix into parametrized smaller tests
Keep API suite parallel-safe and avoid introducing serial mode
summary: Performance profile is healthy with no serial blockers; biggest gain is reducing repeated login setup in E2E tests.
